component.name: SafeTool PDF
component.summary: Privacy-first PDF optimizer — lossless and lossy compression

description.p: SafeTool PDF optimizes and compresses PDF files using lossless and lossy compression techniques. All processing is done 100% locally on your machine — no cloud, no telemetry, complete privacy.

ul.li: Lossless optimization (pikepdf/QPDF): linearization, stream deduplication, object compaction — typically 5-20% savings
Balanced compression: image recompression at 150 DPI + font subsetting — typically 20-50% savings
Maximum compression: aggressive image downsampling + full Ghostscript rewrite — typically 40-80% savings
Custom presets with full control over DPI, quality, and stages
Batch processing for multiple PDF files
Detailed PDF analysis: images, fonts, forms, signatures, bookmarks
